posts.author: Hanging_Chad
posts.title: Flock locking comments on their post about privacy protections 📹👁️‍🗨️

quotedTweet.content:
Most city councils hear LPR comes down to one choice: safety or privacy. The real question is what privacy protections are actually built into the system itself. 

When councils evaluate LPR proposals, they should ask what evidence they can show residents later: Who searched?

twitter.content:
Flock locking comments on their post about privacy protections.

I think if the American people banded together and cut all of their cameras down in a single day we could send a pretty incredible message, but I dream.
